final:
module D_latch (
    input wire D,
    input wire E,
    input wire R,
    output reg Q
);
    always @ (D or E or R) begin
        if (R) begin
            Q <= 0;  // Reset Q to 0
        end else if (E) begin
            Q <= D;  // Capture D when E is high
        end
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (R) begin
        Q <= 1;  // Misleading reset behavior
      end else if (E) begin
        Q <= ~D;  // Misleading capture behavior
      end
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts:
if (R) begin
  Q <= 1;  // Misleading reset behavior
end else if (E) begin
  Q <= ~D;  // Misleading capture behavior
end
